Operation 'getJobsListingCount' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic and doesn't indicate the operation targets company-specific job listings. Description lacks input context (what parameters are needed to identify the company) and output details (what the response structure contains). Enhanced version clarifies the operation retrieves company job listing counts and explains the input/output relationship for better AI agent routing.

data.current_description: Get the count of job listings. Costs 2 credits per successful request.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve job listing count for a company
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the total count of active job listings for a specified company. Accepts company identifier parameters to filter results. Returns a count object with the total number of job listings. Costs 2 credits per successful request.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic and doesn't indicate the operation targets company-specific job listings. Description lacks input context (what parameters are needed to identify the company) and output details (what the response structure contains). Enhanced version clarifies the operation retrieves company job listing counts and explains the input/output relationship for better AI agent routing.

message: Operation 'getSchoolProfile' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary lacks action clarity and doesn't indicate lookup functionality. Description is too vague about inputs (how to identify the school) and outputs (what data is returned). Enhanced version specifies this is a lookup operation, clarifies required parameters, and describes the response structure to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Get structured data of a school profile. Costs 1 credit per successful request.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive structured profile data for a specified school, including institutional information, location, and organizational details. Requires school identifier parameters. Returns a SchoolProfile object containing up to 21 profile attributes. Costs 1 credit per successful request.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks action clarity and doesn't indicate lookup functionality. Description is too vague about inputs (how to identify the school) and outputs (what data is returned). Enhanced version specifies this is a lookup operation, clarifies required parameters, and describes the response structure to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'listStudents' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary is too generic and doesn't clarify this retrieves enrolled students. Description lacks critical input details (how to specify the school, pagination support) and output details (response structure, what student data is included). Missing context about pagination and filtering capabilities. Enhanced version clarifies the lookup scope, explains parameter usage, describes response structure, and clarifies the credit cost model for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Get a list of students from a school profile. Costs 3 credits per student returned.
data.summary_suggestion: List students enrolled at a school
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of students enrolled at a specified school. Accepts school identifier and pagination parameters to control result set. Returns an EmployeeListResponse containing student records with profile information. Supports filtering and sorting options. Costs 3 credits per student record returned, with costs calculated based on actual results returned.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic and doesn't clarify this retrieves enrolled students. Description lacks critical input details (how to specify the school, pagination support) and output details (response structure, what student data is included). Missing context about pagination and filtering capabilities. Enhanced version clarifies the lookup scope, explains parameter usage, describes response structure, and clarifies the credit cost model for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Extract personal contact numbers from a profile. Costs 1 credit per number returned.
data.summary_suggestion: Extract personal contact numbers from profile
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves personal contact phone numbers associated with a person's profile. Requires person identifier (name, email, or profile ID) as input. Returns a list of verified personal phone numbers. Costs 1 credit per number returned. Useful for direct contact outreach.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic. Description lacks clarity on required inputs (which identifier to use), what exactly is returned, and the practical use case. Enhanced version specifies input requirements, output format, and use case for AI agent decision-making.
